org.moeaframework.util.validate

Package
Description
org.moeaframework.util.validate
Methods for validating inputs, arguments, and properties.
  • Classes in org.moeaframework.util.validate used by org.moeaframework.util.validate
    Class
    Description
    DoubleValidator
    Validator for double primitives.
    IntegerValidator
    Validator for int primitives.
    NumberValidator
    Abstract validator for Numbers.
    ObjectValidator
    Validator for generic objects, including arrays.
    ProblemValidator
    Validator for Problems.
    Validator
    Abstract class for validators.
